title: The Strait of Hormuz gamble: how Trump’s blockade threat could reshape a fragile world economy
standfirst: Donald Trump’s threat to block the Strait of Hormuz has turned a long-running regional confrontation into a high-stakes test of endurance, not just firepower. The immediate effect is to raise the price of uncertainty: for Iran, for the White House, and for the global economy that still depends on one narrow waterway.
